title: 3D Digital Twin
description: Rotate the plant, run the sun path, compute shading, inspect equipment, export the scene.

steps.title: The 3D viewport
steps.description: Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, click any object.
steps.voiceScript: This is your plant in three dimensions. Drag to orbit and scroll to zoom.
steps.captionText: This is your plant in three dimensions. Drag to orbit and scroll to zoom.
steps.fallbackMessage: The 3D viewport: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Design parameters
steps.description: Change tilt, azimuth or row spacing.
steps.voiceScript: Change the tilt, azimuth or row spacing on the left.
steps.captionText: Change the tilt, azimuth or row spacing on the left.
steps.fallbackMessage: Design parameters: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Run the simulation
steps.description: The server recomputes shading, yield and the BOQ.
steps.voiceScript: Run the simulation. The server recomputes shading, yield and the BOQ.
steps.captionText: Run the simulation. The server recomputes shading, yield and the BOQ.
steps.fallbackMessage: Run the simulation: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Sun path and shading
steps.description: Scrub month and hour to move the shadows.
steps.voiceScript: Scrub the month and hour sliders to watch shadows cross the array.
steps.captionText: Scrub the month and hour sliders to watch shadows cross the array.
steps.fallbackMessage: Sun path and shading: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Inspect equipment
steps.description: Click a transformer for its spec and BOQ link.
steps.voiceScript: Click any transformer or inverter to inspect its specification.
steps.captionText: Click any transformer or inverter to inspect its specification.
steps.fallbackMessage: Inspect equipment: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Camera presets
steps.voiceScript: The virtual-reality cards fly the camera to a preset viewpoint.
steps.captionText: The virtual-reality cards fly the camera to a preset viewpoint.
steps.fallbackMessage: Camera presets: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Export
steps.description: PNG, scene JSON, object schedule or shadow report.
steps.voiceScript: Export an investor image, the scene, or the shadow report.
steps.captionText: Export an investor image, the scene, or the shadow report.
steps.fallbackMessage: Export: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: The single-line diagram
steps.description: The electrical view of the same plant.
steps.voiceScript: The outputs rail also carries the electrical single-line diagram.
steps.captionText: The outputs rail also carries the electrical single-line diagram.
steps.fallbackMessage: The single-line diagram: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: The one-line
steps.description: Array to grid POI, from the committed sizing.
steps.voiceScript: Here is the same plant drawn as an electrical one-line.
steps.captionText: Here is the same plant drawn as an electrical one-line.
steps.fallbackMessage: The one-line: not visible on this screen yet.
